whyItMatters: The creator of Claude Code has released a 28-minute video where he shares advanced techniques for writing highly effective prompts. I’ve seen $299 courses that don’t cover what he shows in the first 10 minutes. Memory shortcuts, files CLAUDE.md, parallel sessions, prompting patterns… All in a single video and completely free.
